calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288

Petitioner Jomo Kenyatta was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to John Mburu Njoroge.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: James Robertson, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288

Petitioner Jomo Kenyatta present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
After hearing the argument, the petition was denied without prejudice.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Amended
